sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 4:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 4:1
items.html: The First Hey implies the general departure of the first expansion, and the last Hey implies the general departure of the second expansion. (There, and Inner Light)
